"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.skipWhile = void 0; var lift_1 = require("../util/lift"); var OperatorSubscriber_1 = require("./OperatorSubscriber"); function skipWhile(predicate) { return lift_1.operate(function (source, subscriber) { var taking = false; var index = 0; source.subscribe(OperatorSubscriber_1.createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function (value) { return (taking || (taking = !predicate(value, index++))) && subscriber.next(value); })); }); } exports.skipWhile = skipWhile; //# sourceMappingURL=skipWhile.js.map
